title: Usopp and Karoo Keep Moving
description: On pages 5–8, usopp and karoo keep moving as luffy and Usopp push back against Baroque Works on Little Garden while Mr. 3’s wax execution threatens the crew and the giants.
scene: Usopp and Karoo Keep Moving. Luffy and Usopp push back against Baroque Works on Little Garden while Mr. 3’s wax execution threatens the crew and the giants. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Give it up, give it up!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: My *Candle jacket* is as hard as iron once it hardens.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Even the monstrous strength of you giants,

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Is useless once you've been caught in my wax, you see!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: You being drunk from victory proved to be your downfall,

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Please don't glare at me like that, it's frighteningly unbearable, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Isn't this swell...!? You were finally able to settle your duel.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Even though it WAS partially due to the help of a human, you should be happy about your victory!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Fuhahahaha! Of course, as the last man standing, I am the true victor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I wonder if you're aware...? The two of you were once wanted men,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And that enormous sum of bounty money,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Is still valid even to this day...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: So that was your aim all along, Mr. 3...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The one who betrayed our organization.

summary: This part centers on usopp and karoo keep moving, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
